entities.name: n5_lists_health_check.py
entities.context: Python script that monitors list system health and provides recommendations based on list count thresholds

entities.name: N5
entities.context: V's knowledge and organization system containing scripts and lists

entities.name: Phase 3
entities.context: A process or action phase triggered when list count exceeds critical threshold (20+ lists)

entities.name: List system health
entities.context: Framework with urgency levels (NONE, LOW, MEDIUM) and exit codes (0, 1, 2) for monitoring list counts

entities.name: Urgency levels
entities.context: Classification system: NONE (healthy), LOW (warning at 15+ lists), MEDIUM (critical at 20+ lists)

relationships.context: Script resides in N5/scripts/ as part of the N5 system
Script implements the health monitoring framework with status checks and exit codes
Script recommends Phase 3 when list count reaches critical threshold
Phase 3 is the recommended action when health status becomes critical
